title: Usopp Finds His Place on the Crew
description: On pages 5–8, the Straw Hats settle into life aboard their new ship, raise their pirate flag, and meet Johnny and Yosaku on the way toward a cook.
scene: The crew’s mood is lighter after Syrup Village, but practical problems quickly appear: they need roles, supplies, medical help, and eventually a cook.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Holy crap! You hit it on your first shot!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You're right, I did!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I mean, of course I did!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm an expert when it comes to all things aiming!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Feel free to bow down before me and address me as Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've decided!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You can be our sniper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright, I guess I can settle for that for the time being.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But if you ever chicken out from your duties,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'll take charge as the ship's captain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright, fine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, I just had an idea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's still one crucial position of a pirate crew we need to fill before entering grand line.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right, we do have this fantastic kitchen after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course, I could do it as long as I get paid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An indispensable crew member for long voyages.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You think so too, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yup, what a pirate ship crew really needs is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A musician!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you retarded!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And here I thought you were going to say something smart for the first time in your life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea what sailing on the seas is like!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: B-But a pirate's gotta sing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come out you damn pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm gonna slaughter all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just who do you think you are!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who am I...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I should be asking..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who the hell do you think you are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How many enemies are out there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just one... I think.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, then just let Luffyy deal with him.

summary: This part acts as a bridge from Syrup Village to Baratie, giving Usopp a place on the crew and steering the story toward Sanji’s introduction.
